default_repo.description: Repository to create issues in, e.g. my-org/my-repo

labels.description: Optional labels to apply when creating issues, e.g. bug, customer

store_in_ticket_note.display_name: Store issue link in a private ticket note
store_in_ticket_note.description: If enabled, the app adds a private note with the GitHub issue link (requires Freshdesk API key below).

freshdesk_api_key.display_name: Freshdesk API key (optional, for private note)
freshdesk_api_key.description: Used only when adding a private note. Enter as APIKEY:X (the platform will Base64-encode it).
